summary: Add Fulfillment Inbound v2024-03-20 inbound plan creation, polling, inspection, cancellation, and option workflow commands.
reason: Amazon Seller users need a safe terminal workflow for FBA inbound plans, including CSV-to-request conversion, raw JSON passthrough, async operation polling, and guarded confirmation operations.
validated_outcome: go test ./...; go vet ./...; verify-skill; Amazon static sandbox smoke passed for create/status/list/get/cancel, packing, placement, transportation list, and transportation confirm. Static sandbox rejected generateTransportationOptions with InvalidInput even with the official model fixture body.
